stories.first_sentence: The incoming prime minister of Hungary is no fan of Ukraine, but he says he wants to work with the European Union, raising hopes he'll lift a Hungarian veto on a $100 billion EU loan to Kyiv.

stories.headline: Rescuers free young whale after 24-hour stranding ordeal
stories.first_sentence: A whale stranded on a sandbar in Wallis Lake on the NSW mid north coast has been refloated by marine animal rescue teams.
